title: Procession Handoff Artifact Schema
description: Schema for handoff artifact frontmatter produced at procession station boundaries

type.description: Must be 'handoff' to identify this as a procession handoff artifact

source_rite.description: Rite that was active during the source station

target_station.description: Station that will consume this handoff

target_rite.description: Rite expected for the target station

produced_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the handoff was produced

artifacts.description: Work products produced during this station

acceptance_criteria.description: Lightweight, directional criteria for the target station

artifact_reference.description: Reference to an artifact produced during a procession station

path.description: Path to the artifact relative to project root
